ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Patient's age */,
  "smoking" INTEGER /* Smoking status (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "allergy" INTEGER /* Allergy status (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "chronic_disease" INTEGER /* Chronic disease status (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Patient's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Patient's weight in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Patient's blood type */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient experiencing the symptom */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was first reported */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symptom */,
  "symptom_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the symptom (1: mild, 2: moderate, 3: severe) */,
  "yellow_fingers" INTEGER /* Yellow fingers symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "anxiety" INTEGER /* Anxiety level (1: low, 2: high) */,
  "peer_pressure" INTEGER /* Peer pressure (1: low, 2: high) */,
  "fatigue" INTEGER /* Fatigue level (1: low, 2: high) */,
  "wheezing" INTEGER /* Wheezing symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "coughing" INTEGER /* Coughing symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "shortness_of_breath" INTEGER /* Shortness of breath symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "swallowing_difficulty" INTEGER /* Swallowing difficulty symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  "chest_pain" INTEGER /* Chest pain symptom (1: yes, 2: no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "lung_cancer" TEXT /* Lung cancer diagnosis (YES or NO) */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnosis */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment plan */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the treatment plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Doctor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Doctor's last name */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Doctor's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Doctor's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Doctor's address */,
  "hospital" TEXT /* Name of the hospital or clinic where the doctor practices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient making the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor seeing the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment during which the prescription was written */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed for the prescription */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was written */,
  "prescription_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the medication */,
  "prescription_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the medical history */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis for the medical condition */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment for the condition */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who recorded the medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_consumption" (
  "alcohol_consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcohol consumption entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the alcohol consumption habit */,
  "alcohol_consumption" INTEGER /* Alcohol consumption level (1: low, 2: high) */,
  "consumption_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alcohol consumption */,
  "last_consumption_date" TEXT /* Date of the last alcohol consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alcohol_consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohol_consumption_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who ordered the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
